ai_coach.headline: No telemetry synced yet today -- treat this as a true rest/Zone-2 day and log data to restore visibility.
ai_coach.readiness_assessment: No sleep, HRV, resting HR, or body battery data has synced this morning, so readiness can't be quantified. Default to the conservative assumption of a rest/conversational-cardio day as classified, rather than pushing intensity blind.
action_plan: Sync wearable/HRV data before deciding on any cardio intensity today.
If doing Zone 2 work, keep it strictly conversational -- no grey-zone drift, especially without readiness confirmation.
Hit 2300 kcal / 215g protein / 200g carbs / 66g fat today per the Rest/Zone2 target.
Log meals in real time so today's nutrition total is trackable.
Log body weight this morning to re-anchor the glide path.
